notes: BMY | Bamyan | bamyan | CENTRAL | The crown jewel of Afghan tourism, home to UNESCO Buddhas and sapphire lakes. | Afghanistan’s premier cultural destination. Stand before the towering empty niches of the destroyed 6th-century Buddhas and explore the sapphire-blue travertine lakes of Band-e-Amir National Park. Known for its cool climate and the red fortress of Shahr-e Zohak, it is the spiritual and scenic heart of the Hazarajat.
